$comment: Routing map: which existing skills the swarm invokes per lane/job, so it uses Dillon's toolkit instead of reinventing. Mark most-used with "pinned": true so the orchestrator prefers them. Verify names against claude-skills-repo/skills/ and dillon-os/.claude/skills/. Mirror skill now lives at skills/mirror/.

pinned_most_used.$comment: Dillon: set these to the skills + plugins you actually reach for most. The orchestrator prefers pinned skills when a job matches more than one. Placeholder list below — confirm/prune.

routing_rule: Before building anything, the worker checks this map for a matching skill and invokes it. Only build from scratch if no skill matches. Pinned skills win ties. Unknown/new job types get logged to morning-directives for Dillon to route.

sources.plugins: resolve installed plugins on the local machine at boot; reconcile against pinned_most_used.plugins
